data.title: September Retail Sales In Focus: Will Strong Consumer Spending Power A 'No Landing' Rally For Stocks?
data.description: Retail sales report for September could show American consumers propping up economic growth. Predicted increase of 0.3% or more by analysts.

data.title: Don't Sleep on Nokia: Quietly Accelerating Into Infinera Merger
data.description: Nokia Oyj is a worldwide provider of telecom equipment and network infrastructure solutions. The computer and technology sector giant is a major facilitator of 5G and 4G infrastructure deployment along with competitor Telefonaktiebolaget LM Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC).
